nasb.text: But though He had performed so many signs before them, yet they were not believing in Him.

esv.text: Though he had done so many signs before them, they still did not believe in him,

cnv.text: 耶穌在他們面前行了許多神蹟，但是他們仍然不信他。

ccb.text: 耶稣虽然在他们面前行了许多神迹，他们还是不信祂。

csbs.text: 耶稣虽然在他们面前行了这么多神迹，他们仍然不信他。
